headline: Rising AI PC Sales Can’t Hide HPQ’s Mounting Risks
summary: An 11% rally in a month. A mere 7x forward earnings multiple. And a genuine hardware upgrade cycle to AI PCs.

raw.headline: Rising AI PC Sales Can’t Hide HPQ’s Mounting Risks

headline: Potential NVIDIA Deal Puts Fresh Focus On HP’s AI PC Future
summary: NVIDIA is reported to be in advanced talks to acquire a major PC manufacturer, with HP and Dell widely viewed as the main candidates. The reports have triggered fresh attention on HP (NYSE:HPQ) as investors weigh how a potential transaction could reshape the PC and server market. No company involved has issued an official statement, leaving the timing, structure, and likelihood of any deal uncertain. HP shares recently closed at $20.44, with NYSE:HPQ showing a 6.3% gain over the past week...
